title: CANOPUS Double Sided Sticky Pads 32mm Dia, 8-PCs Heavy Duty Waterproof Round Ideal for Home Office Decor, Mounting Pads Black
features: Package includes 8 pieces of double sided round adhesive pads, each with 32mm diameter. Fast and easy-to-use, permanent bonding method provides high strength and long-term durability in highly demanding applications.

HOW TO APPLY: The surface must be dry and clean to maximize adhesive contact. After applying one side of the tape to the desired surface, the bond strength will increase as the adhesive flows onto the surface. Please wait before bonding the other side of the tape for the duration given below to let the tape support a maximum weight. WAITING TIME: At room temperature, 50% of the ultimate strength will be achieved after 20 minutes, 75% after 60 minutes, 90% after 24 hours and 100% after 72 hours.

The 3M 5952 (Black) Acrylic Foam Tape can not only replaces Rivets, Spot Welds, Liquid Adhesives and other permanent fasteners but also provides convenience and simplicity for use many interior and exterior bonding application
These adhesive foam tapes are viscoelastic in nature which gives the foam energy absorbing and stress relaxing features

Ideal for various applications such as crafting, photo mounting, home repairs, DIY projects, wall decorations, and automotive or industrial use, offering strong and reliable adhesion on multiple surfaces like metal, glass, plastic, and wood.
